response.justification: While Bogdan possesses extensive engineering experience and strong backend/distributed systems expertise, including recent contributions to AI-agent infrastructure, he lacks the demonstrated senior technical leadership and organizational scaling experience critical for a Chief Technology Officer role. There is no evidence of managing or growing engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people, developing technical leaders, or architecting complex multi-agent AI systems at an executive level in a fintech context, which are hard requirements for this position.
strengths: Extensive experience in backend and distributed systems, including high-throughput microservices and event-driven architectures.
Recent hands-on experience contributing to AI-agent infrastructure and frameworks.
Familiarity with fintech applications and commercial environments through previous roles.
concerns: Significant lack of demonstrated senior technical leadership and experience scaling engineering organizations (10 to 30+ people).
Limited evidence of designing and operating complex multi-agent AI systems or AI-native fintech integration at an architectural leadership level.
No clear track record of developing internal technical leadership or governing hybrid engineering models.
